appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.theme_mode_desc: Choose between light and dark mode

model_providers.ollama_desc: Ollama runs locally — no API key required.
model_providers.key_storage_desc: Your key is stored locally and never sent anywhere except the provider's API endpoint.
model_providers.delete_api_key_desc: The saved {label} key will be permanently removed from local storage.

memory.title: Chat Memory
memory.enable_memory_desc: Each chat keeps short-term memory, while long-term memory is shared globally and recalled automatically when relevant.
memory.enable_long_term_desc: Stable profile, facts, episodes, and reusable workflows are extracted and shared across chats.
memory.inspect_long_term_desc: Visualise all long-term memory vectors in a PCA scatter plot.
memory.auto_provider_desc: Uses the current chat model's provider. Falls back to OpenAI → Ollama.
memory.openai_load_error: Could not load OpenAI embedding models.
memory.auto_fallback_desc: If the current chat model is Anthropic (no embedding API), memory will fall back to OpenAI if an API key is configured, then Ollama if reachable. If neither is available, memory is skipped for that request — configure a provider explicitly to avoid this.
memory.last_n_turns_desc: Recent conversation turns always included in context.
memory.recall_top_k_desc: Semantically similar past messages injected as context.
memory.recall_threshold_desc: Minimum similarity score for short-term recall. Set to Off to disable score filtering.
memory.extract_every_n_desc: Long-term memory extraction runs after this many complete user → assistant turns.
memory.long_term_top_k_desc: How many long-term memories can be recalled for facts, episodes, and playbooks.
memory.long_term_threshold_desc: Minimum similarity score for recalled facts, episodes, and playbooks. Set to Off to disable score filtering.

token_usage.consumed_usage_desc: Total tokens consumed per selected time bucket.
token_usage.breakdown_desc: Separated token flow for requests and responses.
token_usage.clear_usage_desc: Remove all stored token usage records

app_update.title: Update
app_update.update_action_desc: Check, download, and install updates from GitHub Releases
app_update.unavailable: In-app updates are unavailable in the current runtime.

local_storage.reset_settings_desc: Deleting the {key} key will restore all preferences — including theme, appearance, and any future settings — back to their default values. This cannot be undone.
local_storage.ollama_not_installed: Ollama is not installed. Get it at:
local_storage.ollama_failed_start: Ollama failed to start. Try restarting it:
local_storage.ollama_not_running: Ollama is not running. Start it with:

workspace.title: Workspaces
workspace.workspace_select_desc: Named workspaces can be selected per-chat from the chat input toolbar.
workspace.applied_desc: Applied to every Miso request when workspace toolkit is enabled.

dev.chrome_terminal_desc: Toggle Chromium DevTools for the main Electron window.
dev.electron_only: This setting is available only in Electron development runtime.
dev.ui_testing_desc: Open component testing modal with pre-written scenarios.
